description: Add a self-bootstrapping login layer to any Runneth sandbox app. The first browser visit picks a username + password, scrypt-hashed and stored on disk. From then on, every request outside the allow-list is gated behind /login. Includes JSON API endpoints (/api/auth/status, /api/auth/login, /api/auth/logout) for React frontends, and SameSite=None cookies so sessions work inside the Motion app previewer iframe.

customize.description: The sandbox app name (the folder under /agent/apps/). Read it from `app list`.
The public route prefix the app is mounted under (e.g. '/my-app'). Read it from the app's buildeth.app.json `route` field.
Human-friendly name shown in the setup and login UI (e.g. 'Runneth Dashboard').

post-install: Open server/src/index.ts in the target app and register the auth plugin before any other route. The exact snippet is in integration-snippet.md and SKILL.md walks through the patch.
For React frontend apps: follow the auth state block in frontend-snippet.tsx / integration-snippet.md to add the LoginScreen gate to your App component.

If using per-app credentials: open the public app URL. The first visit will route to /setup; pick credentials and save. If using shared credentials: point credentialsPath at the shared file — setup runs once for the whole group.

changelog.notes: Cookie fix: SameSite=None; Secure (was SameSite=Lax) so sessions work inside cross-origin iframes like the Motion app previewer. Added JSON API endpoints (/api/auth/status, /api/auth/login, /api/auth/logout) for React frontends. Added credentials: 'include' to inline form fetch scripts. Added frontend-snippet.tsx with a ready-to-use React LoginScreen component and auth state gate. Added shared credentials documentation in integration-snippet.md.
Initial release. Fastify plugin, self-rendered setup + login pages, scrypt-hashed credentials, HMAC-signed session cookies, JSON-POST forms compatible with the gateway's content-type parser.
